functions.name: ShopProfileCard
params:
{
  profileName,
  profileLocation,
  profileImageUrl,
  profileSaving,
  profileSaved,
  payoutAccount,
  businessHours,
  fileInputRef,
  onNameChange,
  onLocationChange,
  onPayoutAccountChange,
  onBusinessHoursChange,
  onImageChange,
  onSave,
}

callGraph.callee:
supabase
        .from('merchant_shops')
        .select('shop_id, shop:shops(id, name, location, image_url, payout_account, business_hours)')
        .eq('user_id', profile.id)
        .single

supabase
        .from('merchant_shops')
        .select('shop_id, shop:shops(id, name, location, image_url, payout_account, business_hours)')
        .eq

supabase
      .from('shops')
      .update({
        name: profileName,
        location: profileLocation,
        payout_account: payoutAccount,
        business_hours: businessHours,
      })
      .eq

[
            { label: 'Total Fulfilled',   value: analytics.totalFulfilled,   icon: Package,    isCurrency: false },
            { label: 'Total Value',        value: analytics.totalValue,        icon: TrendingUp, isCurrency: true  },
            { label: 'This Week',          value: analytics.weekFulfilled,     icon: Package,    isCurrency: false },
            { label: 'Available for Withdrawal',  value: analytics.availableBalance,  icon: TrendingUp, isCurrency: true  },
          ].map

supabase
        .from('shop_orders')
        .select(`
          shop_order_id, 
          shop_id, 
          claim_code, 
          subtotal,
          merchant_shops!inner ( user_id ),
          order_items (
            order_item_id,
            item_id,
            allocated_price,
            items ( name, image_url )
          )
        `)
        .eq('claim_code', val.toUpperCase())
        .eq('merchant_shops.user_id', profile?.id)
        .single

supabase
        .from('shop_orders')
        .select(`
          shop_order_id, 
          shop_id, 
          claim_code, 
          subtotal,
          merchant_shops!inner ( user_id ),
          order_items (
            order_item_id,
            item_id,
            allocated_price,
            items ( name, image_url )
          )
        `)
        .eq('claim_code', val.toUpperCase())
        .eq

supabase
        .from('shop_orders')
        .select(`
          shop_order_id, 
          shop_id, 
          claim_code, 
          subtotal,
          merchant_shops!inner ( user_id ),
          order_items (
            order_item_id,
            item_id,
            allocated_price,
            items ( name, image_url )
          )
        `)
        .eq

[
                { name: 'Flutterwave', role: 'Payment processing (mobile money, hosted checkout)', link: 'https://flutterwave.com/zm/privacy-policy' },
                { name: 'Twilio', role: 'WhatsApp recipient notifications', link: 'https://www.twilio.com/en-us/legal/privacy' },
                { name: 'Supabase', role: 'Database, authentication, edge computing', link: 'https://supabase.com/privacy' },
              ].map

supabase
        .from('shop_orders')
        .select(`
          shop_order_id,
          claim_code,
          claim_status,
          recipient_name,
          message,
          transaction:transaction_id (
            buyer:buyer_id (name)
          ),
          order_items (
            item:item_id (id, name, description, image_url)
          ),
          shop:shop_id (name, location, address)
        `)
        .eq('claim_code', code.toUpperCase())
        .single

supabase
        .from('shop_orders')
        .select(`
          shop_order_id,
          claim_code,
          claim_status,
          recipient_name,
          message,
          transaction:transaction_id (
            buyer:buyer_id (name)
          ),
          order_items (
            item:item_id (id, name, description, image_url)
          ),
          shop:shop_id (name, location, address)
        `)
        .eq

[
              {
                icon: Gift,
                color: 'from-orange-500 to-red-500',
                bg: 'bg-orange-50',
                step: '01',
                title: 'Choose a Gift',
                desc: 'Browse curated items from local shops near your recipient.',
              },
              {
                icon: Send,
                color: 'from-red-500 to-rose-600',
                bg: 'bg-red-50',
                step: '02',
                title: 'Send It',
                desc: 'Add a heartfelt message and share the gift link via WhatsApp.',
              },
              {
                icon: Package,
                color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-500',
                bg: 'bg-amber-50',
                step: '03',
                title: 'They Collect',
                desc: 'Your recipient walks in, shows the QR code, and picks it up.',
              },
            ].map

[
              { label: 'Zero delivery costs', desc: 'Customers collect in-store' },
              { label: 'Instant notifications', desc: 'Know when a gift is claimed' },
              { label: 'Trusted payments', desc: 'Settled via mobile money' },
              { label: 'Full dashboard', desc: 'Manage orders and inventory' },
            ].map

supabase
      .from('transactions')
      .select(`
        transaction_id,
        buyer_id,
        total_amount,
        status,
        gateway_tx_ref,
        created_at,
        shop_orders (
          shop_order_id,
          claim_code,
          claim_status,
          recipient_name,
          message,
          shop:shop_id (id, name, location),
          order_items (
            item:item_id (id, name, description, image_url)
          )
        )
      `)
      .eq('transaction_id', id)
      .single

supabase
      .from('transactions')
      .select(`
        transaction_id,
        buyer_id,
        total_amount,
        status,
        gateway_tx_ref,
        created_at,
        shop_orders (
          shop_order_id,
          claim_code,
          claim_status,
          recipient_name,
          message,
          shop:shop_id (id, name, location),
          order_items (
            item:item_id (id, name, description, image_url)
          )
        )
      `)
      .eq

functions.name: MetricCard
params:
{
  icon: Icon,
  iconBg,
  iconColor,
  label,
  value,
  subLabel,
}

callGraph.callee:
supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select(`
          id, code, recipient_name, amount, currency, status,
          created_at, fulfilled_at, paid_at,
          item:item_id (name, image_url),
          shop:shop_id (name, location)
        `)
        .eq('sender_id', profile!.id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select(`
          id, code, recipient_name, amount, currency, status,
          created_at, fulfilled_at, paid_at,
          item:item_id (name, image_url),
          shop:shop_id (name, location)
        `)
        .eq('sender_id', profile!.id)
        .order

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select(`
          id, code, recipient_name, amount, currency, status,
          created_at, fulfilled_at, paid_at,
          item:item_id (name, image_url),
          shop:shop_id (name, location)
        `)
        .eq

[{
          id: `${n.id}-${Date.now()}`,
          orderId: n.id,
          code: n.code,
          message,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          type,
        }, ...prev].slice

[
            { label: 'All Orders', href: '/orders' },
            { label: 'Send a Gift', href: '/home' },
            { label: 'Impact Report', href: '/impact' },
            { label: 'Settings', href: '/settings' },
          ].map

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select('id, code, recipient_name, fulfilled_at, item:items(name), shop:shops(name)')
        .eq('sender_id', user?.id || profile.id)
        .eq('status', 'fulfilled')
        .order('fulfilled_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select('id, code, recipient_name, fulfilled_at, item:items(name), shop:shops(name)')
        .eq('sender_id', user?.id || profile.id)
        .eq('status', 'fulfilled')
        .order

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select('id, code, recipient_name, fulfilled_at, item:items(name), shop:shops(name)')
        .eq('sender_id', user?.id || profile.id)
        .eq

supabase
        .from('orders')
        .select('id, code, recipient_name, fulfilled_at, item:items(name), shop:shops(name)')
        .eq

supabase
        .from('shops')
        .select(`
          id,
          name,
          description,
          location,
          image_url,
          items:items(count)
        `)
        .eq('is_active', true)
        .order

supabase
        .from('shops')
        .select(`

          name,
          description,
          location,
          image_url,
          items:items(count)
        `)
        .eq

supabase

            order_items (
              item:item_id (name, image_url)
            )
          )
        `)
        .eq('buyer_id', profile.id)
        .order

supabase

          status,
          gateway_tx_ref,
          created_at,
